context_for_next_testing_agent: v5.1.0 AI Exit Advisor feature verified. Key changes: (1) New exit_advisor.js module checks open trades every 3 min during market hours (IST 9:15AM-3:30PM). (2) New endpoints: GET /api/exit-advisor/status, GET /api/exit-advisor/advice, POST /api/exit-advisor/analyze. (3) TradesList.js has 'Ask AI' button on each open trade card. (4) ExitAdviceCard component shows AI recommendations (HOLD/EXIT_NOW/PARTIAL_EXIT/TIGHTEN_SL). (5) Uses GPT-4o for analysis via emergent_llm_key. (6) Market is currently CLOSED so advisor shows 0 checks. (7) There are 0 open trades currently so Ask AI button not visible. (8) News fetcher v2 uses parallel Promise.allSettled with round-robin distribution.

ai_exit_advisor.description: AI Exit Advisor checks open trades every 3 min and provides exit recommendations

ask_ai_button.description: Manual 'Ask AI' button on each open trade card for on-demand analysis

exit_advice_card.description: ExitAdviceCard component displays AI recommendations with confidence, risk level, and reason

news_fetcher_v2.description: Parallel fetching with Promise.allSettled and round-robin distribution
